purpose: Strict-alternation selector for Stage 7 paired validators. Guarantees EXACT 50/50 M3 vs Luna validator usage across consecutive tracks. Replaces the rejected probabilistic SHA-256 parity design.
rule: Before Stage 7 dispatch, read last_used; invoke the OTHER validator; after dispatch, flip last_used to the agent just used. Never use SHA-256 parity.
initial_state_reason: Legacy state normalized from the obsolete tera identity to luna on 2026-07-20. Current last_used is m3, so the next validator is Luna.
